prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名从2021年第45名稳步上升至2026年第42名，近年排名持续提升，学校综合实力和认可度增强；2022年曾因校园安全事件出现偏负面舆情，近年声誉平稳；抖音热度排名第34位（较热），综合热度约132万，短视频曝光量处于211高校中上水平，报考关注度较高；化学工程与技术A+（全国顶尖）、化学A-、控制科学与工程A-；化工为王牌学科，与招生专业中的工科试验班（智慧化工/生物医药/能源与环境）、化学类、材料类等高度对应，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐，华东理工在上述领域均有招生，推高报考竞争；本省2026年普通高考总人数约53.5万，较2025年（约46.3万）增加约15.5%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧；华东理工大学位于上海市，对西南地区考生具有较强的地域吸引力；该校在四川招生计划近年持续增加，2026年扩至88人，体现对四川生源的重视。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年扩招12.8%缓解竞争、本省考生增加约15.5%加剧竞争、学校排名上升增强吸引力、热门专业推高报考热度等多重因素，扩招与考生增加效应大致抵消，学校层次提升和热门专业热度使竞争略趋激烈。预测2026年最低位次约14827名，区间14327–15327名。

- 计算机科学与技术（双学士学位项目）。

- 经济学类。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间14327–15327名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档热门专业冲刺、三档王牌但社会热度较低的专业保底。位次优于区间下限（<14327名）可重点冲刺计算机类、电子信息类等一档专业；位次接近区间上限（>15327名）建议以三档化工、材料等王牌专业为主，兼顾二档中等专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 11140 → 15134 → 11877 → 11590 → 13814, showing a fluctuating and backward trend overall; the 2025 baseline is about 13814, which is about 2224 places behind 2024, with significant fluctuations; the provincial science enrollment plan was 61 in 2021 → 64 in 2022 → 68 in 2023 → 66 in 2024 → 78 in 2025 → 88 in 2026, with an increase of 10 students (+12.8%) in 2026 compared to 2025, a clear expansion that theoretically eases competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its ranking on the Soft Science main list has steadily risen from 45th in 2021 to 42nd in 2026, with continuous improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's overall strength and recognition; in 2022, there was a negative public opinion incident related to campus safety, but reputation has stabilized in recent years; its Douyin popularity ranking is 34th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.32 million, and short video exposure is at an upper-middle level among 211 universities, attracting high application attention; Chemical Engineering and Technology is A+ (top in the country), Chemistry is A-, and Control Science and Engineering is A-; chemical engineering is the flagship discipline, highly corresponding to the engineering experimental classes (Smart Chemical Engineering/Biomedicine/Energy and Environment), Chemistry, and Materials majors in the enrollment plan, strongly attracting candidates interested in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended and popular; East China University of Science and Technology enrolls in these fields, increasing application competition; the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province in 2026 is about 535,000, an increase of about 15.5% compared to 2025 (about 463,000), significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition; the university is located in Shanghai, which has strong regional appeal to candidates from the southwest region; its enrollment plan in Sichuan has been increasing in recent years, expanding to 88 in 2026, reflecting the importance placed on Sichuan students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 12.8% enrollment expansion in 2026 easing competition, the approximately 15.5% increase in provincial candidates intensifying competition, the rising school ranking enhancing attractiveness, and the popularity of hot majors boosting application enthusiasm, the effects of enrollment expansion and candidate increase roughly offset each other, while the improvement in school level and popularity of hot majors make competition slightly more intense. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will be about 14827, with a range of 14327–15327.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Computer Science
- Electronic Information
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligence and Robotics)
- Computer Science and Technology (Double Degree Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Mathematics
- Applied Chemistry (Double Degree Program)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Energy and Environment)
- Physics
- Mechanical Engineering (Mechanical Intelligence Experimental Class)
- Economics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Materials (New Materials Experimental Class)
- Chemistry (Intelligent Creation Chemistry Experimental Class/New Engineering Chemistry Experimental Class)
- Bioengineering
- Engineering Experimental Class (Biomedicine)
- Business Administration
- Management Science and Engineering
- Supply Chain Management.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 14327–15327, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 popular majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 flagship but less socially popular majors as a safety net. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<14327), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>15327), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 flagship majors like Chemical Engineering and Materials, while also considering Tier 2 medium majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 3012 → 3234 → 3517 → 4052 → 3924, showing an overall fluctuating downward trend, with a cumulative decline of about 900 positions in the last three years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 3924, moving up about 128 positions compared to 2024, indicating a slight rebound; the provincial liberal arts enrollment plan was 5 in 2021 → 7 in 2022 → 7 in 2023 → 7 in 2024 → 7 in 2025 → 6 in 2026, with a reduction of 1 student (-14.3%) in 2026 compared to 2025, intensifying competition due to fewer spots.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 45th in 2021 to 42nd in 2026, with continuous improvement in recent years; there was a negative public opinion incident related to campus safety in 2022, but reputation has stabilized in recent years; its Douyin popularity ranking is 34th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.32 million, placing admission attention at an above-average level among 211 universities; Chemical Engineering and Technology is rated A+ (top nationally), but the liberal arts admission majors (Law, Public Administration, Foreign Languages and Literature) have low relevance to the university's strong disciplines; liberal arts majors are not the university's core strengths.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has relatively high social popularity (recommended), Public Administration has average popularity (wait and see), Foreign Languages and Literature has average popularity (wait and see); the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province in 2026 is about 535,000, an increase of about 15.5% compared to 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition; East China University of Science and Technology is located in Shanghai, which has strong regional appeal to candidates from the southwest region; the liberal arts enrollment plan is small (6 students), making spots scarce and competition fiercer.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the dual factors of a 14.3% enrollment reduction in 2026 and an approximately 15.5% increase in provincial candidates, both driving up competition, along with the university's rising ranking enhancing its appeal, and liberal arts majors not being the university's core strengths, the trend of intensified competition is clear. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 3558, with a range of 3058–4058.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Liberal arts enrollment is only 6 students, with very few spots, and competition is fierce within the predicted ranking range of 3058–4058. It is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Public Administration as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 Law as a stretch, and use Tier 3 Foreign Languages and Literature as a safety. Candidates with rankings better than the lower limit (<3058) can focus on aiming for Law; those near the upper limit (>4058) should consider Foreign Languages and Literature as a safety.
